background: Homeworld: Narodnya/Wovoka (E657566-7). Grew up hauling agricultural goods. Joined the Solomani Army seeking purpose and stability. Dreams of liberating frontier worlds from Imperial occupation. 'Dukes' nickname from his natural leadership presence.
education: Army basic training and tactical academy
terms: Army (Infantry): Gun Combat (slug)-1, Recon-1, Melee (blade)-1. Infantry training and first combat deployment. Agricultural background made transition to military life easy. Advanced to rank 1.
Army (Infantry): Gun Combat (slug)-2, Leadership-1, Tactics (military)-1. Showed natural leadership abilities. Promoted to squad leader. Advanced to rank 2.
Army (Support): Leadership-2, Heavy Weapons-1, Electronics (sensors)-1. Transferred to support operations. Advanced tactical training. Advanced to rank 1.
Army (Support): Tactics (military)-2, Recon-2, Drive (tracked)-1. Promoted to Lieutenant Colonel. Commanded support operations on unstable worlds. Advanced to rank 3.
Agent (Intelligence): Survival-1. Recruited by SolSec for tactical command and operations planning. True believer in Solomani Cause. Advanced to rank 1.

Agent (Intelligence): Leadership-2, Tactics (military)-2. Current assignment: Reversed Engineering operation. Tactical commander. Advanced to rank 2. Mustering out: Gauss Rifle, Gauss Pistol, Tactical Computer, 5000cr.
interactions: Expertise: Tactical command, squad leadership, military operations, heavy weapons, sensors and reconnaissance, inspiring troops
Weaknesses: Idealistic to a fault, questions methods that harm innocents, can be rigid in following doctrine, agricultural roots sometimes show
